overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's waterfront district at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting vibrant neon signs including 'BD SHACK' and Japanese hotel signage, with the character traversing sidewalks, crossing intersections, and walking under illuminated overpasses along the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial waterfront sidewalk with neon signage

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in dark clothing along the wet sidewalk, approaching a crosswalk with the BD SHACK sign visible on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark outfit walking steadily ahead of the camera along the waterfront path

entered.detail: large red neon sign with skull logo reading 'BD SHACK' mounted on building facade
wet paved walkway with reflective surface showing neon light reflections
tall modern street lamps with multiple spherical lights
elevated highway overpass with structural supports and neon lighting
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky along the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet waterfront sidewalk at night, approaching a crosswalk. The BD SHACK neon sign glows red on the right, while street lamps illuminate the reflective pavement. The character follows a pedestrian ahead toward an intersection with an overpass visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with towering commercial buildings and holographic billboards

events.description: exiting the narrow sidewalk into the wide open intersection space
crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass by
camera tilts upward to view the towering building facade covered in advertisements

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the massive building covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection with headlights on
person in bright pink jacket crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with blue neon 'HOテル' sign and multiple large holographic billboards
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
cluster of bright digital advertisements and corporate logos on building facades

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide urban intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements. The camera tilts upward to reveal the massive HOテル building facade with bright neon signage. Vehicles pass by on the road as pedestrians cross in different directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with green neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway overpass
green neon lights from the overpass structure illuminate the scene with colored glow

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass following a pedestrian in a red jacket through the green-lit corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead under the overpass structure

entered.detail: green glowing neon light strips mounted on the underside of the overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway overpass with green neon lights illuminating the concrete structure overhead. The environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered, with the wet pavement reflecting the green glow from above as the character follows a pedestrian through the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with city skyline view and palm trees

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into the open waterfront promenade area
passing illuminated benches and vending machines along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with the Night City skyline visible across the water, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt and shorts walking toward the camera along the promenade

entered.detail: dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and towers visible across the water
metal safety railing along the edge of the water with reflective surface
futuristic blue benches with underglow lighting
tall red vending machine with glowing interface and product display
red neon BD SHACK sign visible again as the path curves

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the open waterfront promenade with a panoramic view of the Night City skyline across the water. The path is lined with palm trees, illuminated benches, and vending machines, with neon billboards visible on distant buildings and the BD SHACK sign reappearing as the walkway curves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit waterfront district that shifts from narrow urban sidewalks to a wide, panoramic promenade. It begins along a wet sidewalk where the red glow of a BD SHACK sign reflects off the pavement as the camera follows a pedestrian toward a busy intersection. As the character crosses the wide road, the view tilts upward to reveal towering buildings and the massive, bright neon facade of a hotel amidst holographic advertisements. The scene then transitions into a more enclosed environment, moving beneath an elevated highway overpass where green neon lights cast a vivid glow over the concrete structure and reflective ground. Finally, the camera emerges from the shelter of the overpass onto an open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and vending machines, revealing a panoramic view of the distant Night City skyline.
